decisions.rationale: LEFT JOIN returns all-null for students with no plan row; isNotNull on id is required to exclude them from the watch bucket

decisions.decision: IN-03 tests use makeQueryMock helper for chainable Drizzle-style builder
decisions.rationale: Drizzle queries are thenable, chainable objects — mock must support .from().where().leftJoin() chaining
